source_description: In a coffee shop, Joey, Ross, and Chandler sit on an orange sofa behind a coffee table covered with photographs of a baby. Ross holds a photograph in both hands, looking at it, while Joey and Chandler sit beside him, each resting his head on one hand and gazing toward the photos.
